risk_relevance: Cross-border exposure may increase sanctions, correspondent, or jurisdictional risk

risk_relevance: Jurisdiction can influence expected transaction patterns
example_use_case: Higher-risk corridors can justify tighter thresholds

risk_relevance: Retail, SME, and HNW customers often have different behavior patterns
example_use_case: SME and HNW profiles may require more frequent review

risk_relevance: Some products support higher complexity or movement of funds
example_use_case: Trade finance and investment products can map to different scenarios

risk_relevance: Digital, wire, and cash channels create different monitoring needs
example_use_case: Wire-heavy or cash-heavy activity may trigger lower thresholds

risk_relevance: Cash-intensive or mixed funding can increase uncertainty
example_use_case: Cash-intensive profiles can be routed to enhanced review

risk_relevance: Expected counts and amounts define the customer baseline
example_use_case: Activity materially above baseline generates monitoring observations
